title: Grafana Plugin Backend Process Crash Loop Signatures
app: Grafana Enterprise or OSS with app plugins; ship logs via UF
spl:
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:log" logger=plugin.backend OR component=plugin
| search "panic" OR "SIGSEGV" OR "plugin process exited" OR "plugin crashed"
| stats count by plugin_id, datasource_uid
| sort -count
description: Unstable plugins take down query paths for critical datasources.
value: Isolates which plugin binary needs rollback or update.
implementation: Include `plugin_id` from structured logs; mask secrets in stack traces at ingest.
